name: Detective AnnIntae: Missing Basketball Court
short_description: Solve the disappearance of the basketball court with Detective Ann Intae of JooJoo City!
detailed_description:
Exciting Bizarre Comic Story with a Simple Click!

The solitary hyena of JooJoo City,
(It is only a simple description, he is a handsome Basenji.)
The comet that separates the pitch black, the one and only detective Ann In-tae.
Just a simple click to tell the story of the game!
Let's get to the bottom of the disappearance of the basketball court with Ann In-tae!


At the crossroads of choice, what answer will you be heading for?!

The options you'll face as you talk!
Only the right choice will pave the way forward.
But keep in mind! Choices come with responsibilities.
No forgiveness and mercy for the wrong choice! Be careful as it leads to extreme game over!
No mid-save! Starting from the beginning again?
But don't worry,
You can go right back to where you were!


There's light in the wrong answer! Let's collect the absurd ending!

You're tired of the continuous wrong answers!
But what if there's an absurd ending waiting at the end?
Let's face various wrong answers and earn rewards accordingly!
The collected ending can be viewed in the album!


Then let's go to JooJoo City with Ann In-tae right now!
Here we go!!
